analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet highlights multiple crises in East Africa (locusts, coronavirus, landslides, floods) and announces that "we" have mobilised €3 million for emergency aid to those most in need. This presents EU (presumably) providing humanitarian assistance abroad. Evaluation: EU1 (EU is a successful story) – Not applicable; no historical reflection or institutional success story. EU2 (EU is united) – Not indicated; no mention of unity or intra-EU solidarity. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – Not applicable; action is outside the EU. EU4 (avant-garde political actor) – No pioneering policy or leadership framing. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – The tweet is humanitarian aid, not framed as defending rights/democracy; thus not clearly EU5. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – Yes; it showcases EU mobilizing funds to provide emergency aid abroad, illustrating contribution to global well-being. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU6.
